---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or an improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the user pain or use case. "I want X" is fine; "I want X because otherwise Y takes 20 minutes every morning" is better.

## Proposed solution

What would a working version of this look like? UI? CLI? API endpoint? Feel free to sketch.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they aren't as good.

## Scope check

- [ ] This belongs in the core binary (every Qorven user benefits).
- [ ] This is better as a plugin / optional integration.
- [ ] Not sure — want maintainer input.

## Volunteer

- [ ] I'd like to work on this myself.
- [ ] I'm filing this hoping someone else picks it up.
